comments.body:
@mtrmac @vrothberg 
```
# github.com/containers/image/v5/internal/manifest
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/internal/manifest/oci_index.go:154:42: type func(a v1.Descriptor, b v1.Descriptor) bool of func(a, b imgspecv1.Descriptor) bool {â€¦} does not match inferred type func(a v1.Descriptor, b v1.Descriptor) int for func(a E, b E) int
github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pkg/signature/payload
```
seems to be causing the build issues.

I think this would be a good time to add packit tasks on c/[common,image,storage] .
Merging #2064 should cause this PR to be auto-closed.
